prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to environmental permit applications managed by the Environment Agency, which operates solely in England. Therefore, it does not apply to Scotland, as environmental regulations and permitting within Scotland are overseen by the Scottish Environment Protection Agency (SEPA).
